title: StageDefinition
description: Open SimFlow stage definition schema. Stages describe research intent, evidence outputs, checks, approval triggers, and handoff guidance.

id.description: Optional stage id when different from name

acceptable_inputs.description: Acceptable evidence or inputs; guidance only

recommended_skills.description: Recommended skills or helpers; not exclusive

approval_triggers.description: Risky actions that require explicit approval

risk_notes.description: Common risks to surface to the host agent

canonical_stage.description: Canonical top-level stage for legacy aliases

legacy_alias.description: Whether this file is retained as a legacy stage alias

required_inputs.description: Legacy compatibility only; use acceptable_inputs for new contracts

expected_outputs.description: Legacy compatibility only; use evidence_outputs for new contracts

default_skill.description: Legacy compatibility only; use recommended_skills for new contracts

validators.description: Legacy compatibility only; use suggested_checks for new contracts
